name: Cusp
description: Quarter arcs meet at cusps, the curves rerouting corner to corner.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 90deg, 180deg, 270deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: var(--color1); -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; @size: 100%; background: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: circle(100% at 0 0); clip-path: circle(100% at 0 0); -webkit-transition: ease 400ms; transition: ease 400ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 400ms; transition: ease 400ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
